sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check the current state after the LEFT, RIGHT, RIGHT sequence.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Level completed?", last_action_result.get('level_completed', False))

print("\nGreen objects:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  pixels={n['pixels']}, bbox=[{min(rows)},{min(cols)}]-[{max(rows)},{max(cols)}]")

print("\nAgent position:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] == 16:
        b = n['boundary']
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  cols [{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}]")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: TOOL RESULT: python
sections.content:
Level completed? False

Green objects:
  pixels=8, bbox=[40,28]-[43,29]
  pixels=12, bbox=[52,20]-[57,21]

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The agent and tail didn't move! The agent is still at cols 22-25, and the tail is still at cols 20-21. The LEFT, RIGHT, RIGHT sequence didn't work.
Wait, that's strange. The LEFT move should have moved the agent from cols 22-25 to cols 18-21. But the agent is still at cols 22-25.
Let me think about this. Earlier, the agent was at cols 18-21, and I clicked the third blue block (LEFT), which moved the agent to cols 14-17. So the LEFT button works.
But now the agent is at cols 22-25, and clicking the LEFT button didn't move the agent. Maybe the agent can only move LEFT from certain positions?
Actually, wait. Let me re-examine. The agent was at cols 18-21, and I clicked the third blue block (LEFT), which moved the agent to cols 14-17. Then I clicked the bottom-most blue block (RIGHT) 4 times, which moved the agent to cols 22-25 (only 2 moves worked).
Now the agent is at cols 22-25, and I clicked the third blue block (LEFT), but the agent didn't move. Maybe the agent can only move LEFT once before getting stuck?
Hmm, this is confusing. Let me try clicking the LEFT button again to see if it works.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# LEFT didn't work from cols 22-25. Let me try again.
print("Testing LEFT again...")
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 37, 'col': 1}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
